text: The precise, clean geometry of glass and metal around me elicits a sense of modern order, yet the harsh lines and emptiness hint at a separation from the organic flow of life. Moving inside, the vivid colors and bold displays awaken curiosity and intellectual excitement. Here, surrounded by the language of research and innovation, I feel the electric pulse of human potential—yet I also wonder if these spaces foster real connection or simply curate the illusion of progress.
